homepage.title: Your expert for installation material, maritime lighting and CCTV. - WISKA - make power smile
homepage.description: WISKA supplies cable glands, installation material, maritime lighting and CCTV, inter alia, for the maritime industry, shipbuilding, offshore facilities, electrical trade and transport engineering

Your expert for installation material, maritime lighting and CCTV.
Welcome at WISKA
Over 100 years experience as manufacturer for shipbuilding, industry and trade make us your partner when it comes to installation materials, lighting and video surveillance. From cable glands and junction boxes to searchlights, floodlights and reefer container sockets to CCTV systems, we offer you innovative products of highest quality.
